overview: A minimal NFT minting dApp on the Internet Computer. Connect your Plug wallet, upload an image, give it a name, and mint your ICRC-7 NFT directly on-chain. View all your minted NFTs in a personal gallery.
features: Plug wallet connection with Internet Identity fallback
Upload PNG/JPG images (max 5MB) with name and optional description
Mint ICRC-7 NFTs directly to your principal on ICP
Images stored as blobs in stable canister memory — no data loss on upgrade
Personal NFT gallery showing only your minted NFTs
Success screen with token ID and canister dashboard link
